description: Lock Kepler's 1609 planetary-motion node to Tycho's pre-telescopic data and Copernican context, not telescope use.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to Astronomia Nova and Kepler's first two laws.
Tycho's pre-telescopic observational dataset remains the relevant observation lineage.
Kepler's model context remains Copernican heliocentrism.
The telescope should not be restored for the scoped 1609 laws unless the node is broadened to later optical astronomy.
